results.title: Platform admin missing management features
results.details: Platform Dashboard at /admin shows: 33 total organizations, 97 users, 14 active subscriptions, revenue analytics, module analytics. All key management features present. API /admin/organizations=200, /admin/revenue=200.

results.title: New joiner can't edit profile
results.details: Employee profile page loads at /employees/524. 'Edit My Info' button visible in top-right. Clicking enables field editing. Tabs: Personal, Education, Experience, Dependents, Addresses, Custom Fields.

results.title: Can't find Clock Out button
results.details: Attendance page at /attendance/my shows Check In and Check Out columns with timestamps. Request Regularization button also available.

results.title: Orphan departments
results.details: Orphan department_ids {20, 21} confirmed. 20 users total, 5 unique dept IDs used. 16 valid departments in system. IDs 20 and 21 do not exist in /organizations/me/departments.

results.title: Can't select leave type
results.details: Leave type select dropdown works. Options: Earned Leave, Maternity Leave, Paternity Leave, Sick Leave, custom types. Form has dates, days, reason, submit. Selection confirmed working.

results.title: Employee count mismatch
results.details: org.current_user_count=12 in login response, but GET /users returns 20 users. Difference of 8.

results.title: Leave shows User IDs instead of names
results.details: Pending Leave Requests table shows actual employee names (Ananya Gupta, Priya Patel). No 'User #524' patterns found.

results.title: Attendance no date picker
results.details: Attendance Dashboard has Year dropdown, Department filter, Date From/To date inputs with calendar icons, Apply/Clear buttons. 2 date inputs and 3 calendar icons confirmed.

results.title: Projects sub-pages all 404
results.details: All Project module sub-pages return 404: /dashboard, /projects, /tasks, /board, /timesheet. HTTP and browser both confirm 404. Styled 404 page shown.

results.title: LMS sub-pages 404
results.details: LMS sub-pages not functional. /dashboard and /courses redirect to LMS login (SSO broken). /my-courses shows 'Page not found'. LMS has separate auth, does not accept EmpCloud creds.
